projects.title: Simulacrum - AI Film
summary: A journalist is assigned to cover the growing protests against Simulacrum — a simulation game where every person on Earth has an identical virtual counterpart. When the reclusive developer refuses all interviews, an unexpected invitation arrives: from his virtual double, inside the game. He says he has a story to tell. And that she already knows the first half.

projects.title: TikTok Core Product Infra - The Main APP
summary: I served as a platform-level designer under TikTok's Core Product Infrastructure team, helping set component standards and running weekly app-wide design reviews.
I owned foundational UI components used globally across the app, including pop-up modals, feed bottom actions, intro sheets, navigation bars, floating notices, and in-app push notifications.

sections.title: Tripo Studio - AI-native 3D professional workstation.
body: Tripo Studio is the world's first AI-native 3D workstation designed specifically for professional 3D creators — solving the real pain points of professional 3D creators by using AI to accelerate complex stages of the 3D Pipeline.

As the product designer, I built the design system from zero to one and redesigned the responsive web app — from 3D model generation to AI real-time texture painting, retopology, rigging, segmenting, assets, and more.

I was also responsible for most of the product management and strategy. I have reconstructed the complex interaction strategies for the 3D pipeline running on the web and established the SOP and standards for evaluating 3D model performance.
Every decision aimed at one thing: making professional 3D creation 4x faster — more controllable, more creative, more polished, and more professional.

projects.title: TikTok Entertainment

sections.title: Harvard XR Conference Visual Identity
body: HarvardXR 2026: From Pixel to Voxel explores the convergence of AI and XR at Harvard University and beyond. The conference provides a platform for students, researchers, practitioners, and entrepreneurs to discuss how XR is shaping the future across industries, examining its history, current applications, and emerging possibilities.

To express the conference’s core values, I developed the overall visual identity concept and led a team of designers in extending and applying it across different touchpoints. Centered on the motif of voxels, which symbolize 3D digital building blocks and technological evolution, the visual system reflects the event’s innovative and future-oriented spirit.

projects.title: Willow iOS
projects.navTitle: Pop Mart - Skull Panda Commercial CG
summary: I worked on the iOS design for Willow from zero to launch, owning the core user-facing experiences.
Designed five key surfaces - Dictionary, Homepage, Dictation History, Style Matching, and Profile and Settings - with a focus on activation, retention, and conversion.

sections.title: Pop Mart - Skull Panda Commercial CG
body: In early 2024, we received an invitation from Pop Mart to create a surrealist CG promotional film for their new SKULLPANDA collectible figure series, themed around absurdist joy.

We divided the film into 5 chapters, using a surrealist visual language to bring the absurdist joy of the SkullPanda series to life — expressing a critique of and reflection on time, gravity, imagination, order, and reality.
